title: The Mobile Money Transaction Levy (Amendment) Act, 2025

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Mobile Money Transaction Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Mobile Money Transaction Short title
Levy (Amendment) Act, 2025, and shall be read as one with the and commen-
cement
Mobile Money Transaction Levy Act, 2024, in this Act referred to
as the principal Act. Act No. 25
of 2024
(2) This Act shall come into operation on 1st January, 2026.

sections.heading: Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion of Amendment
sections.text:
Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the deletion of Amendment
the definitions of “betting” and “person to person transfer” and the of section 2
substitution therefor of the following:
“betting “ has the meaning assigned to the word in the Customs Cap. 322
and Excise Act; and
“person to person transfer” means a transfer of electronic
money from one person to another person or to that same
person.

sections.heading: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of the Schedule Repeal and
sections.text:
The principal Act is amended by the repeal of the Schedule Repeal and
and the substitution therefor of the Schedule set out in the Appendix. replacement
of Schedule
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price K4.00 each

Levy (Amendment)
